source_pr.title: planner: support record table runtime stats during optimize
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: yisaer <disxiaofei@163.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/38779

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

support record table runtime stats during optimize in order to support plan replayer capture later

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test


### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. This PR stabilizes it by: planner: support record table runtime stats during optimize.
fix_pattern: planner: support record table runtime stats during optimize

PR title: planner: support record table runtime stats during optimize
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/38876
